title: F8thul Glowing Ores
description: Glowing Ores for F8thul by Ewan Howell
body:
# F8thful Glowing Ores adds a little ✨sparkle✨ to F8thful, making ores glow.
This recource pack makes F8thful look nicer with shaders and making ores more visible in a dark cave.
Credits to Ewan Howell's F8thful texture pack
[![F8thful](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80093ceedb12861ba0a82529fa7912984ef22c0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/f8thful)
Make sure to check it out!
**Also don't forget you need Optifine or Iris to make it work!**
